title: Ramsey ready for challenge as new Oxford head coach
summary: Aaron Ramsey has been appointed as Oxford United's new permanent head coach at the League One club. He is taking on his first permanent coaching role and expressed readiness for the challenge.
content: New Oxford United boss Aaron Ramsey says he is ready for his first permanent head coach role at the League One club.

zh.title: 拉姆塞准备好担任牛津联队新主教练的挑战
zh.summary: 亚伦·拉姆塞被任命为英甲联赛俱乐部牛津联队的新任常任主教练。他首次担任常任教练职位，并表示已做好应对挑战的准备。

title: Leeds agree contract with Fulham forward Wilson
summary: Leeds have signed Fulham attacker Harry Wilson on a long-term contract as a free transfer. The move brings Wilson to the Championship club on a permanent deal.
content: Leeds agree a long-term contract with Fulham attacker Harry Wilson to join on a free transfer.

zh.title: 利兹与富勒姆前锋威尔逊达成合约
zh.summary: 利兹足球俱乐部以自由转会的方式与富勒姆前锋哈里·威尔逊签署了长期合约。此举使威尔逊以永久交易加入英冠联赛球队。

title: Defender Gusto considering Chelsea future
summary: Chelsea defender Malo Gusto is evaluating options to leave the club this summer. Chelsea have valued the defender at £75 million as he explores a potential transfer.
content: Chelsea defender Malo Gusto is exploring his options to leave this summer, with the club placing a £75m price tag on him.

zh.title: 后卫古斯托考虑离开切尔西
zh.summary: 切尔西后卫马洛·古斯托正在评估今夏离队的选项。切尔西对这名后卫的估值为7500万英镑，他正在探索潜在的转会。

title: Tuchel's England are opposite to Southgate's - and built to beat top teams
summary: BBC Sport's tactics analyst Umir Irfan examines how Thomas Tuchel's England system differs fundamentally from his predecessor Gareth Southgate's approach. Tuchel's tactical setup is specifically designed to succeed against elite international teams.
content: BBC Sport's football tactics writer Umir Irfan explains why Thomas Tuchel's England system is built to prosper against the world's top nations.

zh.title: 图赫尔的英格兰与南盖特的方式完全相反 - 专为击败强队而打造
zh.summary: BBC体育战术分析师乌米尔·伊尔凡分析了托马斯·图赫尔的英格兰体系如何从根本上不同于前任加里斯·南盖特的方法。图赫尔的战术设置专门为在精英国际球队面前获胜而设计。

title: Who has been eliminated from the World Cup?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team provides a comprehensive list of nations eliminated from the 2026 World Cup tournament. The feature tracks the knockout progress and remaining contenders in the competition.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team lists the full set of nations who have been eliminated from the 2026 World Cup so far

zh.title: 有哪些国家已被淘汰出世界杯?
zh.summary: BBC体育的问答栏目为从2026年世界杯淘汰出局的国家提供了全面列表。该栏目追踪淘汰赛的进展和比赛中的剩余参赛者。

title: Why Bellingham was not sent off for covering his mouth
summary: England midfielder Jude Bellingham avoided a red card despite covering his mouth while conversing with Ghana's Jordan Ayew during their World Cup match. The incident highlights interpretation of disciplinary rules in international football.
content: England midfielder Jude Bellingham was not shown a red card despite covering his mouth while talking to Ghana's Jordan Ayew.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆为什么因掩盖嘴巴而没有被罚下
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员朱德·贝林厄姆在与加纳球员乔丹·阿耶在世界杯比赛中交谈时掩盖嘴巴，但仍避免了红牌。这起事件突出了国际足球纪律规则的解释问题。

title: Swansea great and ex-Wales player Williams dies
summary: Herbie Williams, a legendary Swansea City player and former Wales international, has died at age 85. Williams was a significant figure in Welsh football history.
content: Swansea City great and former Wales international Herbie Williams dies aged 85.

zh.title: 斯旺西传奇和前威尔士球员威廉斯去世
zh.summary: 传奇斯旺西城队球员和前威尔士国脚赫比·威廉斯去世，享年85岁。威廉斯是威尔士足球史上的重要人物。

title: Lazio to pay compensation in pregnancy dispute case
summary: Lazio Women have been ordered to pay compensation to former midfielder Maja Gothberg after unlawfully terminating her employment due to pregnancy. The ruling addresses workplace discrimination in professional sports.
content: Lazio Women have been ordered to pay compensation to former midfielder Maja Gothberg because they unlawfully ended her employment due to pregnancy.

zh.title: 拉齐奥因怀孕纠纷被判赔偿
zh.summary: 拉齐奥女足被下令向前中场球员玛雅·哥特贝格赔偿，因其因怀孕非法终止其雇佣合同。该裁决涉及职业体育中的职场歧视问题。

title: World Cup quiz: Name Scotland and Brazil's teams in 1998
summary: BBC Sport offers a trivia quiz challenging readers to recall the Scotland and Brazil squads from their 1998 World Cup encounter. The quiz tests knowledge of classic World Cup lineups from nearly three decades ago.
content: Test your knowledge of the Scotland and Brazil sides that faced each other at the 1998 World Cup

zh.title: 世界杯竞赛：说出1998年苏格兰和巴西的球队
zh.summary: BBC体育推出琐事竞赛，挑战读者回忆1998年世界杯苏格兰和巴西的阵容。这个竞赛考察了近三十年前经典世界杯球队阵容的知识。

title: England to face Scotland? World Cup knockout stage as it stands
summary: BBC Sport provides an interactive projections tool with live updates showing each country's potential path through the World Cup knockout rounds. Users can explore possible matchups and tournament scenarios based on current standings.
content: Use BBC Sport's projections tool with in-game updates to plot your country's route through the World Cup knockouts.

zh.title: 英格兰对阵苏格兰？世界杯淘汰赛现状
zh.summary: BBC体育提供交互式预测工具，实时更新显示各国在世界杯淘汰赛中的潜在晋级路径。用户可以根据当前排名探索可能的对阵和比赛情景。

title: Spurs' Tonali hunt shows chasm Newcastle must bridge
summary: Tottenham's pursuit of midfielder Sandro Tonali illustrates the significant gap Newcastle must overcome to compete with rival clubs. Despite narrowly avoiding relegation last season, Spurs are actively strengthening while Newcastle face challenges in their rebuild.
content: The pursuit of Sandro Tonali by Tottenham - who narrowly avoided relegation last season - shows the challenge Newcastle face.

zh.title: 热刺对托纳利的追逐凸显纽卡斯尔必须弥合的差距
zh.summary: 热刺对中场球员桑德罗·托纳利的追求凸显了纽卡斯尔为与竞争对手竞争必须克服的巨大差距。尽管上赛季险些降级，热刺正在积极加强阵容，而纽卡斯尔在重建过程中面临挑战。

title: What to look out for on EFL fixture release day
summary: BBC Sport provides a guide ahead of the fixture announcement for England's Championship, League One, and League Two on June 25. The article highlights key considerations for fans and analysts watching the schedule release.
content: All the information you need before the Championship, League One and League Two fixtures are announced on 25 June.

zh.title: EFL赛程发布日应该关注的事项
zh.summary: BBC体育提供指南，介绍英格兰冠军级、一级和二级联赛的赛程将于6月25日发布。这篇文章强调了球迷和分析师观看赛程发布时的关键考虑因素。

title: Football Daily
summary: A roundup of the day's major football news includes England's draw with Ghana, Cristiano Ronaldo's latest developments, and Scotland's preparation for their Brazil match. The bulletin covers key international and club football stories.
content: England are held by Ghana, Ronaldo serves up humble pie, and Scotland gear up for Brazil.

zh.title: 每日足球新闻
zh.summary: 今日足球新闻综述包括英格兰与加纳的平局、克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的最新进展以及苏格兰为与巴西比赛所做的准备。该新闻简报涵盖了主要的国际足球和俱乐部足球故事。

title: World Cup's best matches, moments, goals & players so far - ranked
summary: BBC Sport ranks the best matches, moments, players and goals of the World Cup after two rounds of fixtures, providing a comprehensive overview of the tournament's standout performances so far.
content: After two rounds of fixtures, BBC Sport ranks the best matches, moments, players and goals of the World Cup so far.

zh.title: 世界杯迄今为止最好的比赛、时刻、进球和球员——排名
zh.summary: BBC体育在世界杯进行两轮比赛后，对最好的比赛、时刻、球员和进球进行了排名，为赛事迄今为止的杰出表现提供了全面的概述。

title: 'Rangers close to re-signing McCrorie' - gossip
summary: Rangers are reportedly close to signing Bristol City's Ross McCrorie, while Celtic pursue Sandefjord's Zinedin Smajlovic and Heart of Midlothian's Alexandros Kyziridis attracts interest from Greek clubs. The transfer activity reflects ongoing competition in Scottish football.
content: Rangers are reportedly close to signing Bristol City's Ross McCrorie as Celtic are said to have increased their offer for Sandefjord's Zinedin Smajlovic while Heart of Midlothian's Alexandros Kyziridis is linked with top Greek clubs.

zh.title: '流浪者队接近重新签下麦克罗里'——传言
zh.summary: 据报道流浪者队接近签下布里斯托尔城的罗斯·麦克罗里，凯尔特人队追求桑德菲尤德的齐内丁·斯马伊洛维奇，而中日汉姆联的亚历山德罗斯·基齐里迪斯吸引了希腊俱乐部的兴趣。转会活动反映了苏格兰足球持续的竞争。

title: What are Scotland's chances of progressing as third-place finishers?
summary: With 32 of 48 teams advancing to the World Cup knockout rounds, qualification is more likely than elimination, significantly improving Scotland's chances of progressing even as a third-place finisher.
content: With 32 of 48 teams advancing to the knockout rounds of the World Cup it is more difficult to be eliminated than to qualify.

zh.title: 苏格兰作为第三名球队的晋级机会如何？
zh.summary: 由于48支球队中有32支晋级世界杯淘汰赛，晋级的可能性大于被淘汰，这大大提高了苏格兰即使作为第三名球队也能晋级的机会。

title: Scotland primed for game of their lives against fallible Brazil
summary: Scotland face Brazil in a crucial World Cup group match where they must improve on their previous performances to advance, though their exact qualification requirements remain unclear. Analyst Tom English examines the team's preparation for this pivotal encounter.
content: Scotland don't know what they need against Brazil to reach the World Cup knockout phase, but will know they need to improve on the previous two games, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 苏格兰为对阵巴西的关键之战做足准备
zh.summary: 苏格兰将在世界杯小组赛中对阵巴西，他们必须改进之前的表现才能晋级，尽管他们的确切出线要求仍不清楚。分析师汤姆·英格兰分析球队为这场关键比赛的准备工作。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 17
summary: This interactive quiz challenges readers to identify a World Cup player in as few attempts as possible, offering an engaging test of fan knowledge about tournament participants.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯明星第17号
zh.summary: 这个互动测验挑战读者尽可能少地尝试识别一名世界杯球员，为球迷提供了一个关于赛事参赛者知识的有趣考验。

title: World's oldest football in Miami for Scotland's game against Brazil
summary: A historic football dating from approximately 1540-1570, discovered in Stirling in the 1970s, is being used for Scotland's World Cup match against Brazil in Miami. The artifact represents a significant moment in football history's modern competition.
content: The ball, which is believed to date from between 1540 and 1570, was discovered in Stirling in the 1970s.

zh.title: 世界最古老的足球在迈阿密苏格兰对巴西比赛中使用
zh.summary: 一个约公元1540-1570年的历史足球，在1970年代在斯特林发现，被用于苏格兰在迈阿密对阵巴西的世界杯比赛。该文物代表了足球历史在现代竞赛中的重要时刻。

title: Colombia qualify for last 32 with win over DR Congo
summary: Daniel Munoz's deflected goal secured Colombia's advancement to the 2026 World Cup knockout stage with a victory over DR Congo, confirming their place in the last 32.
content: Daniel Munoz's deflected strike is enough for Colombia to beat DR Congo and secure their place in the 2026 World Cup knockout stage.

zh.title: 哥伦比亚战胜刚果民主共和国晋级32强
zh.summary: 丹尼尔·穆尼奥斯的偏转球破门帮助哥伦比亚击败刚果民主共和国，确保了他们在2026年世界杯淘汰赛中的席位，确认了他们进入32强的位置。

title: Ancelotti's quest to end Brazil's 24-year wait for World Cup glory
summary: Carlo Ancelotti leads Brazil in their World Cup campaign aimed at ending a 24-year drought without a tournament title, with the decisive final group game against Scotland looming. BBC Scotland examines the Italian manager's mission.
content: BBC Scotland's Andy Burke looks at Carlo Ancelotti and his mission at Brazil before their final Group C game against Scotland.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂终结巴西24年世界杯冠军梦的征程
zh.summary: 卡洛·安切洛蒂率领巴西参加世界杯，目标是结束24年没有锦标赛冠军的困境。与苏格兰的关键小组最后一战迫在眉睫。BBC苏格兰对这位意大利主帅的任务进行了分析。

title: No extra revenue for Fifa from hydration breaks - Infantino
summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino clarifies that World Cup hydration breaks are "purely a sporting matter" without generating additional revenue for the organization, addressing concerns about the controversial practice.
content: Hydration breaks at the World Cup are "purely a sporting matter" and bring "no additional revenue for Fifa", says president Gianni Infantino.

zh.title: 因凡蒂诺：补水休息不为FIFA带来额外收入
zh.summary: FIFA主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺澄清，世界杯补水休息是"纯粹的体育问题"，不会为该组织产生额外收入，以此回应对这一争议性举措的关切。

title: Quiz: How well do you know birthday boy Messi at World Cups?
summary: As Lionel Messi celebrates his 39th birthday while performing well at the World Cup, this quiz tests fan knowledge of his tournament history and legacy.
content: Argentina great Lionel Messi turns 39 today and has been lighting up the World Cup this summer, but how well do you know his journey so far?

zh.title: 测验：你对寿星梅西的世界杯知识了解多少？
zh.summary: 当莱昂内尔·梅西在世界杯上表现出色的同时庆祝39岁生日时，这份测验考查了球迷对他的赛事历史和传奇的了解程度。

title: Croatia earn narrow win to knock out Panama
summary: Croatia defeated Panama to secure their first group stage points and remain in contention for the knockout round, while Panama is eliminated from the tournament. The narrow victory keeps Croatia's last-32 hopes alive.
content: Croatia remain in contention for a last-32 spot at the World Cup after earning their first points in Group L with a win over Panama, who are knocked out of the World Cup following the loss.

zh.title: 克罗地亚险胜巴拿马晋级
zh.summary: 克罗地亚击败巴拿马，获得小组赛首场胜利，保持在淘汰赛的争夺中，而巴拿马遭到淘汰。这场险胜让克罗地亚的32强希望仍然存活。

title: Silly tackle, bad reaction - Tuchel defends Bellingham after Queiroz row
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel defends midfielder Jude Bellingham after a heated confrontation with Ghana boss Carlos Queiroz during their World Cup match, highlighting tensions between the teams.
content: England manager Thomas Tuchel defends Jude Bellingham after the midfielder is involved in a heated row with Ghana boss Carlos Queiroz.

zh.title: 图赫尔在克尔罗兹争执后为贝林厄姆辩护
zh.summary: 英格兰主帅托马斯·图赫尔在世界杯比赛中与加纳主帅卡洛斯·克尔罗兹发生激烈对峙后，为中场球员朱德·贝林厄姆进行辩护，凸显了两队之间的紧张关系。

title: No need to panic for England - but this was a reality check
summary: England's goalless draw with Ghana serves as a reality check rather than cause for alarm, according to analyst Phil McNulty, demonstrating the team's need to improve despite strong tournament form overall.
content: England's drab goalless draw with Ghana is no cause to panic - but it does serve as a reality check, writes Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 英格兰无需恐慌——但这是一次现实检视
zh.summary: 根据分析师菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂的说法，英格兰与加纳的无进球平局是一次现实检视，而非惊恐的原因，表明尽管球队整体赛事表现强劲，仍需改进。
